verdict.answer_first: A and B both answer immediately; B's first sentence is direct: "Heap snapshot diffing is the technique that actually finds it."
verdict.decisiveness: B commits most clearly to one path: "Heap snapshot diffing is the technique that actually finds it" and "workflow I'd use, in order."
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on now because it gives a no-code command flow: "node --heapsnapshot-signal=SIGUSR2 your-app.js" then "kill -USR2 <pid>".
